title: EndfieldEarlywindowModule
description: This is a module for EndfieldPanorama to work correctly in NeoForge's early loading screen.
body:
# About
**EndfieldEarlywindowModule** is a module provided by **EndfieldPanorama** to assist with the early loading screen of Neoforge. Please ensure that this module and the mod's jar file are both located in the mods directory.

Caution: This mod is still in the development stage. Some features have not been completed yet, and there may be potential memory leak bugs. If you experience crashes or other issues, please open an [issue in GitHub](https://github.com/LouisQuepierts/EndfieldPanorama/issues)
